title: Invincible Loading
description: Grants invincibility while and after loading screens to prevent prevent unfair, lag-induced deaths and damage.
body:
A simple mod that grants invincibility during login, respawn, and dimension changes to prevent damage caused during loading screens and laggy chunk loading.

The invincibility timers are fully configurable.

For heavy modpacks, a longer login time is recommended, as the loading screen may slow down with more mods. Around one minute (1200 ticks) is ideal for most computers.
